charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0300: Iono was just asking me and Raikou...
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0400: if we’d be in one of her videos!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0500:
Yeah! I’ve got a theory that the Raging Bolt
I partnered up with on Pasio might be
Raikou’s ancestor!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0600:
Aaand I need Ethan and his partner to make
an appearance so the vid’s electrifying!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0700: But! One thing before we press record!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0800:
Turns out, I’unno much about Raikou to begin
with! So...gimme the scoops!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_0900: Sure! I only know so much, though.
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1000:
They say that it descended with lightning and
carries rain clouds on its back.
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1100:
Lots of eyewitness reports suggest the
Pokémon is related to lightning.
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1200:
Ohohoho, that’s a shocker! This one’s in the
big leagues, huh!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1300:
When we battle together, there are moments
I can tell those reports are true.
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1400:
Its strength lies in its speed and powerful
electric attacks, like an incarnation of
lightning itself!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1500:
Ooooh, I like that! “Lightning Incarnate”
would make a catchy title for the video!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1600:
We’ve gotta have somethin’ eye-catching to
get more views and stand out from the
competition!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1800:
Raikou, Entei, and Suicune are known as
Legendary Pokémon of Johto.
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_1900:
Kris paired up with Suicune, and Lyra formed
a sync pair with Entei.
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2000:
I wanna help improve Raikou’s strengths!
That way, we won’t lose to those two!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2100:
Looks like Raging Bolt’s got your back,
Raikou!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2200:
We were watching y’all tear it up at the
Neo Champion Stadium!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2300:
Isn’t that nice, Raikou? We’ve got more
friends cheering for us!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2400:
All right! Let’s teach everyone just how cool
these two Pokémon are...
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2600:
Awww yeah! Now you’re speakin’ my
language!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2700:
You’ll stay and help us, right,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2800:
Awesome! With you here, I’ll feel less
nervous!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_2900:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]’s joinin’ the
crew! Welcome to the team, friendo!
charaepi_ch0112_91_hibiki/2301_1201_3000:
I made it all the way to Pasio, so I wanna
cherish every bond I make here!
